title: Slovakian Pumpkin Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian recipe featuring pumpkin dumplings with a mellow mustardy sauce.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Carefully add the dumplings to the boiling water and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and drain off any excess water.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced pumpkin to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until tender.
Add the mellow mustardy sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked dumplings to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Serve the Slovakian pumpkin dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
